interface.name: zsingularity_blur_manager_v1

description.summary: blur manager for Singularity shell surfaces

interface.description: This interface allows a shell surface to request that the compositor blur the content rendered behind it, creating a frosted-glass effect.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy the blur manager. All blur objects created via this manager remain valid.

entry.name: invalid_surface
entry.summary: the wl_surface argument is not valid

request.name: get_blur

description.summary: get blur object for a surface

request.description: Create a blur object for the given surface. Only one blur object may exist per surface at a time.

interface.name: zsingularity_blur_v1
interface.description:
A blur object is associated with a wl_surface and controls how the compositor blurs content behind that surface.
The blur parameters are double-buffered: they take effect when commit() is called.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy the blur object. The blur effect is removed from the associated surface.

request.name: set_radius
request.description: Set the blur radius in pixels. A radius of 0 disables blur. Changes take effect on the next commit().

request.name: set_noise
request.description: Set the noise amount as a percentage (0-100). Noise is overlaid on the blurred region to reduce banding. Changes take effect on the next commit().

request.name: commit
request.description: Apply all pending blur parameter changes (radius, noise).
